EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} could not import custom groups "{datafield2}" on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} created custom groups "{datafield2}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} imported custom groups "{datafield2}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} could not change custom groups "{datafield2}" on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} deleted custom groups "{datafield2}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} could not create custom groups "{datafield2}" on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} could not delete custom groups "{datafield2}" on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} changed custom groups "{datafield2}" on host {event_src.host}
